locations.title: Locations
locations.description:
Current locations: {location_list}

Add, edit, or remove a location, or finish setup.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_static.title: Add Static Location
add_static.description: Select an HA zone to monitor. NWS zone IDs are automatically resolved from the zone's GPS coordinates. You can edit them after resolution.

add_tracked.title: Add Tracked Device
add_tracked.description: Select a device tracker to receive alerts wherever the device is located.

edit_static.title: Edit Static Location
edit_static.description: Edit the HA zone and query mode. NWS zone IDs are automatically resolved from the zone's GPS coordinates.

edit_tracked.title: Edit Tracked Device
edit_tracked.description: Edit the device tracker and query mode.

error.zone_resolve_failed: Could not resolve GPS coordinates to NWS zones
error.zone_no_gps: Selected zone does not have GPS coordinates
